challengeClaim(uint256,string).details: If the original wallet isn't actually lost, they can cancel the claim

params.reason: Explanation of why this is fraudulent

finalizeClaim(uint256).details: Anyone can call this to finalize, but usually the claimant

finalizeExecution(uint256).details: Can be called by anyone once the timelock on VaultInfrastructure is complete

guardianVote(uint256,bool).details: Only guardians set on the vault can vote

params.approve: True to approve, false to reject

initiateClaim(address,string,bytes32,str.details: User must have found the vault via VaultRegistry search first

params.evidenceHash: Hash of any identity evidence (documents, etc)
params.reason: User's explanation of why they're claiming this vault
params.recoveryId: The recovery ID to verify ownership (plaintext)
The recovery ID the user remembers

nodeVote(uint256,bool).details: Used when vault has no personal guardians, or as additional verification

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

canFinalize(uint256).notice: Check if claim can be finalized

challengeClaim(uint256,string).notice: Original owner challenges/cancels a recovery claim

challengeTimeRemaining(uint256).notice: Calculate time remaining in challenge period

finalizeClaim(uint256).notice: Finalize an approved claim after challenge period

finalizeExecution(uint256).notice: Finalize a claim after VaultInfrastructure timelock has passed

getActiveClaimForVault(address).notice: Get active claim for a vault

guardianVote(uint256,bool).notice: Personal guardian votes on a recovery claim

initiateClaim(address,string,bytes32,str.notice: Initiate a recovery claim for a vault

initiateClaimByRecoveryId(string,string).notice: Initiate claim using only recovery ID (simplified flow)

nodeVote(uint256,bool).notice: Guardian node votes on a recovery claim
